title: RECEIPT_PAYLOAD_V1
description: Payload schema for RECEIPT ledger events. RECEIPT binds to a prior VERDICT via triple binding: (verdict_id, ref_verdict_payload_hash_hex, ref_verdict_cum_hash_hex). NO RECEIPT = NO SHIP rule enforced by validate_receipt_linkage.py.

schema.description: Schema version discriminator. MUST be exactly 'RECEIPT_PAYLOAD_V1'.

receipt_kind.description: Receipt category: SHIP (delivery confirmed), ABORT (termination confirmed), CHECKPOINT (intermediate proof), SEAL (closure proof).

receipt_id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Deterministic, never wall-clock derived. Example: R-000001.

verdict_id.description: verdict_id from the VERDICT event this receipt binds to.

ref_verdict_payload_hash_hex.description: MUST equal the payload_hash of the VERDICT ledger event. First leg of triple binding.

ref_verdict_cum_hash_hex.description: MUST equal the cum_hash of the VERDICT ledger event. Second leg of triple binding.

verdict_ledger_length.description: seq+1 of the VERDICT event (number of events in ledger at verdict time).

receipt_ledger_length.description: seq+1 of this RECEIPT event (number of events at receipt time). Must be > verdict_ledger_length.

receipt_cum_hash_hex.description: cum_hash of this RECEIPT ledger event (HELEN_CUM_V1 scheme). Third leg of triple binding — anchors receipt in the chain.

refs.description: Cryptographic references that bind this receipt to its VERDICT and anchor both in the ledger.

verdict_payload_hash_hex.description: SHA256(Canon(verdict_payload)) recomputed by the receipt issuer at receipt-write time. MUST equal refs.ref_verdict_payload_hash_hex.

verdict_cum_hash_hex.description: Recomputed HELEN_CUM_V1 cum_hash for the verdict event. MUST equal refs.ref_verdict_cum_hash_hex if provided.

recomputed.description: Values recomputed by the receipt issuer to prove active verification (not copy-paste).

outcome.description: Mirrors decision.outcome from the VERDICT payload. Must match.

verdict_kind.description: Mirrors verdict_kind from the VERDICT payload. Must match.

subject_id.description: Mirrors subject.subject_id from the VERDICT payload.

mirrors.description: Key fields mirrored from the VERDICT payload. Redundant but enables validation without full ledger scan.

attestations.description: List of actor attestations. MAYOR attestation required for SHIP receipts.
